tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: Hey, I've been working on this new project where I'm trying to blend traditional tribal sounds with modern electronic music. I want to keep track of my creative direction and influences so I can stay consistent as I work on different pieces. Can you help me save all of this for future reference?

That's a fascinating project! I can definitely help you store your creative direction and influences for future reference.

Let me save what you've shared so far:

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "Creative project: Blending traditional tribal sounds with modern electronic music. Goal is to maintain consistent creative direction across different pieces. User wants to track influences and creative vision for future reference."}

messages.content: {"status": "success", "tool": "add_memory", "memory_id": "mem_creative_project_001", "stored_text": "Creative project: Blending traditional tribal sounds with modern electronic music. Goal is to maintain consistent creative direction across different pieces. User wants to track influences and creative vision for future reference."}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content:
Done! I've saved your project description. Your creative direction—blending traditional tribal sounds with modern electronic music—is now stored for future reference.

If you'd like, I can help you add more details like:
- Specific tribal traditions or instruments you're drawing from
- Electronic music styles or artists influencing you
- Your goals for the project
- Any particular tracks or pieces you're working on

Just let me know what else you'd like to remember!

Hey, that sounds great! I'm actually ready to start working on some new tracks now. Could you pull up what we saved earlier? I want to make sure I'm staying true to my original vision before I dive in.

Goal is to maintain consistent creative direction across different pieces. User wants to track influences and creative vision for future reference.", "created_at": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"}], "query": "tribal electronic music creative project direction", "count": 1}
messages.name: skill-tools-search_memories

messages.content:
Here's what we saved earlier:

**Your Creative Project:**
- **Core concept:** Blending traditional tribal sounds with modern electronic music
- **Goal:** Maintain consistent creative direction across different pieces
- **Purpose:** Track influences and creative vision for future reference

You're all set to dive in! This vision gives you a solid foundation—traditional tribal textures meets modern electronic production. Let me know if you want to add any more specific influences or details as you start working on your tracks!

Hey, that's helpful! But I think I might have added more details in our earlier sessions. Could you pull up everything I've stored so far? I want to see the complete picture of all my musical memories and inspirations to make sure I have the full creative history before I start working.
{"status": "success", "memories": [{"id": "mem_001", "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "text": "User is working on a tribal electronic music creative project and seeking direction"}], "count": 1}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Here's everything currently stored:

**Memory 1** (created 2024-01-15):
> "User is working on a tribal electronic music creative project and seeking direction"

That's the complete picture—there's only this one memory saved so far. It looks like what we just stored is actually the only entry in your creative history. 

If you were expecting more details from earlier sessions, they might not have been saved yet. Would you like to add more now? I can help you store things like specific tribal instruments or traditions you're drawing from, electronic music influences, artists you're inspired by, or any other creative notes to build out your full vision!

Hey, I've actually moved in a different direction with my recent work—I'm now focusing more on acoustic tribal elements rather than the electronic side. Could you help me clean up what we stored earlier and remove anything that no longer fits where I'm at now?
Absolutely! Let me remove that old memory about the electronic direction since it's no longer relevant to where you're at now.

Done! I've removed the old memory about the electronic direction.

Now that you've shifted to focusing on acoustic tribal elements, would you like me to save your new creative direction? I can store something like:

**New Direction:** Acoustic tribal music - focusing on organic, non-electronic tribal sounds and instruments.

Let me know if you want to add any more details about this new direction (specific instruments, traditions, influences, etc.) and I'll save it for you!

Yes, please save my new direction! I've been really inspired by organic percussion and acoustic instruments lately—things like djembes, frame drums, and flutes. I'd love to have that stored as my current focus.

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "Creative direction: Acoustic tribal music focused on organic percussion and acoustic instruments. Specific influences include djembes, frame drums, and flutes."}

messages.content: {"status": "success", "tool": "add_memory", "memory_id": "mem_002", "text": "Creative direction: Acoustic tribal music focused on organic percussion and acoustic instruments. Specific influences include djembes, frame drums, and flutes."}

**Current Creative Focus:**

- **Influences:** Djembes, frame drums, and flutes

You've got a solid foundation to work from. Good luck with your new tracks! Let me know if you want to add more as your work evolves.
